title: Antique Waystones
description: Adds Antique Atlas markers when activating a Waystone
body:
Adding markers to your Antique Atlas every time you activate a Waystone is annoying, so I automated it!

Now, whenever you activate a waystone, as long as you have an atlas in your inventory, it'll add a new marker with the waystone's name.

 

[ ![Use promo code: "HorribleNerd" on BisectHosting for 25% off](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/990eac5d-2336-4a3d-b0e4-11f7bfc8b227.webp "https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/990eac5d-2336-4a3d-b0e4-11f7bfc8b227.webp")](https://bisecthosting.com/HorribleNerd "https://bisecthosting.com/HorribleNerd")

 

This mod is Forge only and has to be installed on both the client and the server.

 
Also works great with Towers of the Wild!
